business.name: Ahmed Plumbing & Electrical Merchants
business.tagline: Your Local Trade Merchant in Birmingham

contact.address: 435 Moseley Rd, Balsall Heath, Birmingham B12 9BX

sample_reviews.author: Tariq H
sample_reviews.text: Brilliant local merchant — always have the parts I need in stock. Staff are knowledgeable and helpful. Great prices too.

sample_reviews.author: Dave M
sample_reviews.text: Solid trade counter with a good range of plumbing and electrical stock. Quick service and they know their stuff.

sample_reviews.author: Yasmin B
sample_reviews.text: Really helpful team, sourced a hard-to-find part for my boiler same day. Will definitely be coming back.

brand.usp: A trusted local trade counter serving Birmingham's plumbers and electricians with a wide range of quality supplies at competitive prices. Conveniently located on Moseley Road with friendly, expert staff ready to help.
brand.hero_headline: Quality Trade Supplies Right Here in Birmingham
brand.about_paragraph: We are Ahmed Plumbing & Electrical Merchants, a well-established trade counter based on Moseley Road in Balsall Heath, Birmingham. We stock a comprehensive range of plumbing, heating, and electrical supplies to keep local tradespeople working efficiently. Whether you need a specific fitting, a boiler part, or a full bathroom suite, we're here to help you get the job done.
